_comment: Hand-curated benchmark positions for regression detection (plan §6.3). Each position is reached by applying `moves` in sequence from the Glinski initial position. Moves use the binding's notation (e.g. 'f1-f2', 'f10-f11=Q'). Fields: id, category, description, moves (list[str]), expected_best_move (optional, for regression only), expected_wdl (optional, [W,D,L] hint). TODO: expand tactical/endgame entries with hand-verified mates and draws.
